ddls:
CREATE TABLE "corporations" (
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corporation or organization */,
  "corp_name" TEXT /* Name of the corporation or organization */,
  "town" TEXT /* Town where the corporation or organization is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the corporation or organization is located */,
  "directors" TEXT /* Number of directors or a range of directors if applicable */,
  "capitol_stock" TEXT /* Amount of capitol stock, if available */,
  "file_date" TEXT /* Date the corporation or organization was filed */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number where the record is documented */,
  "page" INTEGER /* Page number where the record is documented */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., corporation, church, association) */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the entity was founded */,
  "dissolution_date" TEXT /* Date the entity was dissolved, if applicable */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Current legal status of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the entity */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the original source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporations_town FOREIGN KEY ("town") REFERENCES towns ("town_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the town is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the town */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the town */,
  "population_1900" INTEGER /* Population of the town in the year 1900 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_towns_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "population_1900" INTEGER /* Population of the county in the year 1900 */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corporation or organization the director is associated with */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_role" TEXT /* Role of the director within the corporation or organization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the director started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the director ended their role, if applicable */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, historian, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corporation or organization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corporation or organization the document is associated with */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., charter, minutes, financial report) */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the document for easier searching */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)
